from prometheus_client import Counter

REQUEST_COUNT = Counter("http_requests_total", "Total requests", ["method", "endpoint", "status"])


def track_user_action(action: str) -> None:
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method="POST", endpoint="/actions", status="success").inc()


def record_api_call(path: str, status: int) -> None:
    status_group = f"{status // 100}xx"
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method="GET", endpoint="/api", status=status_group).inc()


def log_metric(category: str, value: float) -> None:
    counter = Counter(f"custom_{category}_total", f"Counter for {category}")
    counter.inc(value)
